//: SteamPipe upload settings — fill in the two IDs from partner.steamgames.com.
//appId: App Admin page for Mana Ledger — the number in the URL (Apps & Packages → All Applications).
//depotId: App Admin → SteamPipe → Depots. The auto-created default depot is usually appId + 1.
//account: Your Steamworks (Steam) login name. Password + Steam Guard are prompted interactively on first upload.
//branch: Branch to set live automatically after upload. Leave empty to set builds live by hand in the dashboard (recommended until the first release is out).
